The Range

Four models. One French signature.

From the city-ready C3X to the fully-electric ë-C3X, every Citroen at VTK is built on the same idea: comfort without compromise.

Hatchback

C3X

Starts ₹4.99 Lakh*
Turbo petrol and CNG options, with SUV-style stance and a fuel tank built for real Indian mileage.
